x.name: Andrew Huberman
x.bio: Professor of Neurobiology and Ophthalmology at Stanford Medicine • Host of Huberman Lab • Focused on science and health research and public education

tweets.text: My reasons for posting “predictions” = what once was a niche space is changing. Peptide Sciences (gray market giant) gone, Nova & HIMS partnering (I find that interesting & important re how it will impact the broader market), general interest in (non)GLP peptides skyrocketing.

I’ve been posting a lot about peptides and some of the health sociology and rules around them. A few people understandably assumed I am being paid for it. I’m not paid by any pharmaceutical company or peptide company. If that were to change, I of course, would make it known.

x.name: 宝玉

tweets.text:
FYI
https://t.co/zX3fUMbalD

因为现在nodejs比较普及，而 bun 可以通过 npx -y bun 运行的，这样只要有nodejs就可以用bun，所以我在 skills 里面都会让 agent 自己检查并灵活选择。

还有一点，我在 skills 里面用的路径都是相对路径，但告诉了 agent 基础目录（baseDir）在哪，这样基本不会找路径出错。
https://t.co/clXcN4aYFq https://t.co/Dx1LifqWQf

我现在所有 skills 的脚本，默认用 bun 执行，因为 bun 可以直接执行 TypeScript，不需要预先编译，这带来的好处就是如果出错了，Agent 可以快速定位到代码里面的问题，然后直接修改代码再次运行，如果是打包后的代码这就很难打补丁。

任何语言或者环境，Agent 友好才是王道！ https://t.co/84ZmL36k1x
